title: Creative FPS+
description: This modpack combines Creative FPS with essential mods to boost performance and gameplay quality.t improves FPS, reduces lag, and makes the game smoother overall. 💙
body:
![FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6fb2f7ff534d64bd6ef61094ba22e9360cccae_0.webp)
![Sodium incluted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ouh3d0iU/images/8629b6f20abee881175f1b2cdc26af7e991baa4b.webp)

## 📦 Description

A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on performance and gameplay.
The modpack is designed to provide high FPS, fast game loading, and crisp visuals.
The modpack is designed to provide a simple yet high-performance gameplay experience.

The modpack is suitable for low- and mid-range PCs and multiplayer servers.
The modpack is designed to work on low- and mid-range PCs.
The modpack is designed to work on multiplayer servers.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🚀 Performance Boost

* High and stable FPS
* Reduced lag and stuttering
* Fast game loading
* Chunk rendering
* Memory optimization
* Entity and block rendering
* Redstone and server optimization
* Smooth multiplayer experience

### 🎨 Graphics and Visual Improvements

* Shader
* Clean lighting
* Reduced unnecessary rendering
* Block entity
* Full bright
* Rendering and model fixes

### 🛠 Quality of Life

✔ High FPS
✔ Smooth gameplay
✔ Clean visuals
✔ Multiplayer
